targets.expr: (sum by(cache) (rate(cache_gets_total{job="jwt-demo",result="hit"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by(cache) (rate(cache_gets_total{job="jwt-demo"}[5m])), 1e-9)) or on() vector(0)

(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(uri, le) (rate(http_client_requests_seconds_bucket{job="jwt-demo"}[5m]))) * 1000) or (avg by(uri) (http_client_requests_seconds{job="jwt-demo",quantile="0.95"}) * 1000) or on() vector(0)
